steps.title: Identify what computer services matches in 2010 and 2019
steps.content: Computer services reaches 6 thousand in 2010—the same as engineering services. It drops to 5 thousand in 2019—the same as technical consulting services.

steps.title: Match this trajectory to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice B correctly states both transitions: computer services in 2010 equaled engineering services (6 = 6) and in 2019 equaled technical consulting services (5 = 5).

A gets the 2010 comparison right but falsely claims computer equals engineering in 2019 (5 ≠ 6); C and D make false claims about the 2010 relationship.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
